TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: uzai a maḍusa a marekaka ka sitsuayan.
S.PHON: uzai a maɖusa a marəkaka ka siʦuajan.
S.FORM: uzai a madrusa a marekaka ka sicuayan.
S.PHON: uzai a maɖusa a maRəkaka ka siʦuajan.
S.TRANSL: Once upon a time there were two brothers.

S.FORM: kiɫavaran a kaka tjaɫaɫak: "uzai a djaraɫap i katsasavan ku liɫing.
S.PHON: kiʎavaran a kaka caʎaʎak: "uzai a ɉaraʎap i kaʦasavan ku ɭiʎiŋ.
S.FORM: kiljavaran a kaka tjaljaljak: "uzai a djaraljap i kacasavan ku liljing.
S.PHON: kiʎavaRan a kaka ʦaʎaʎak: "uzai a ɉaRaʎap i kaʦasavan ku ɣiʎiŋ.
S.TRANSL: The younger brother said: “There is a banyan tree in the courtyard that I shelter under.

S.FORM: nu tja leglegen, matjani a vaɫitjuq kasi vavaw tua djaraɫap, kaka," ayain a tjavulung.
S.PHON: nu ca ɭəgɭəgən, macani a vaʎicuq kasi vavaw tua ɉaraʎap, kaka," ajain a cavuɭuŋ.
S.FORM: nu tja leglegen, matjani a valjitjuq kasi vavaw tua djaraljap, kaka," ayain a tjavulung.
S.PHON: nu ʦa ɣəgɣəgən, maʦani a vaʎiʦuq kasi vavaw tua ɉaRaʎap, kaka," ajain a ʦavuɣuŋ.
S.TRANSL: When we shake it, money falls down from on top of the banyan, brother,” he said to the older one.

S.FORM: qau "nu maitazua vaik anga ken kiliɫing, sa ku leglegi anga, uɫa ken a puvaɫitjuq," aya a kaka a tjavulung.
S.PHON: qau "nu maitazua vaik aŋa kən kiɭiʎiŋ, sa ku ɭəgɭəgi aŋa, uʎa kən a puvaʎicuq," aja a kaka a cavuɭuŋ.
S.FORM: qau "nu maitazua vaik anga ken kililjing, sa ku leglegi anga, ulja ken a puvaljitjuq," aya a kaka a tjavulung.
S.PHON: qau "nu maitazua vaik aŋa kən kiɣiʎiŋ, sa ku ɣəgɣəgi aŋa, uʎa kən a puvaʎiʦuq," aja a kaka a ʦavuɣuŋ.
S.TRANSL: “In that case I’ll go and shelter under it and shake it, so that I can get some money,” said the older brother.

S.FORM: qau inika tsuatsuay vaik azua kaka a tjavulung a kiliɫing, sa leglegi.
S.PHON: qau inika ʦuaʦuaj vaik azua kaka a cavuɭuŋ a kiɭiʎiŋ, sa ɭəgɭəgi.
S.FORM: qau inika cuacuay vaik azua kaka a tjavulung a kililjing, sa leglegi.
S.PHON: qau inika ʦuaʦuaj vaik azua kaka a ʦavuɣuŋ a kiɣiʎiŋ, sa ɣəgɣəgi.
S.TRANSL: Not long afterwards the older brother went and sheltered under it and shook it.

S.FORM: manu matjani a marka qatjuvi marka qatjulaɫ marka qatsiɫay.
S.PHON: manu macani a marka qacuvi marka qacuɭaʎ marka qaʦiʎaj.
S.FORM: manu matjani a marka qatjuvi marka qatjulalj marka qaciljay.
S.PHON: manu maʦani a maRka qaʦuvi maRka qaʦuɣaʎ maRka qaʦiʎaj.
S.TRANSL: But snakes, worms and stones fell down.

S.FORM: qau limutseng azua kaka a tjavulung.
S.PHON: qau ɭimuʦəŋ azua kaka a cavuɭuŋ.
S.FORM: qau limuceng azua kaka a tjavulung.
S.PHON: qau ɣimuʦəŋ azua kaka a ʦavuɣuŋ.
S.TRANSL: The older brother was angry,

S.FORM: muri seqasen a kaka a tjaɫaɫak.
S.PHON: muri səqasən a kaka a caʎaʎak.
S.FORM: muri seqasen a kaka a tjaljaljak.
S.PHON: muRi səqasən a kaka a ʦaʎaʎak.
S.TRANSL: and was going to knife his younger brother.

S.FORM: qau kiɫavaran a kaka a tjaɫaɫak: "nu ini su kasalu, tiakenay a lemegleg."
S.PHON: qau kiʎavaran a kaka a caʎaʎak: "nu ini su kasaɭu, tiakənaj a ɭəməgɭəg."
S.FORM: qau kiljavaran a kaka a tjaljaljak: "nu ini su kasalu, tiakenay a lemegleg."
S.PHON: qau kiʎavaRan a kaka a ʦaʎaʎak: "nu ini su kasaɣu, tiakənaj a ɣəməgɣəg."
S.TRANSL: The younger brother said: “If you don’t believe me, I’ll do the shaking.”

S.FORM: qau leglegen nimadju.
S.PHON: qau ɭəgɭəgən nimaɉu.
S.FORM: qau leglegen nimadju.
S.PHON: qau ɣəgɣəgən nimaɉu.
S.TRANSL: He shook it;

S.FORM: mintu matjani a vaɫitjuq marka situngan.
S.PHON: mintu macani a vaʎicuq marka situŋan.
S.FORM: mintu matjani a valjitjuq marka situngan.
S.PHON: mintu maʦani a vaʎiʦuq maRka situŋan.
S.TRANSL: and down fell money and clothes.

S.FORM: qau masalu anga a kaka a tjavulung.
S.PHON: qau masaɭu aŋa a kaka a cavuɭuŋ.
S.FORM: qau masalu anga a kaka a tjavulung.
S.PHON: qau masaɣu aŋa a kaka a ʦavuɣuŋ.
S.TRANSL: So the older brother believed him.

S.FORM: kiɫavaran anan uta azua kaka a tjaɫaɫak: "uzai a niaken a titaw a bulabulay.
S.PHON: kiʎavaran anan uta azua kaka a caʎaʎak: "uzai a niakən a titaw a buɭabuɭaj.
S.FORM: kiljavaran anan uta azua kaka a tjaljaljak: "uzai a niaken a titaw a bulabulay.
S.PHON: kiʎavaRan anan uta azua kaka a ʦaʎaʎak: "uzai a niakən a titaw a buɣabuɣaj.
S.TRANSL: The younger brother also said: “I’ve got a fine hoe.

S.FORM: nu tja sikali tua qipu, ɫekatsauan a sauzayan," ayain a kaka tjavulung.
S.PHON: nu ca sikaɭi tua qipu, ʎəkaʦauan a sauzajan," ajain a kaka cavuɭuŋ.
S.FORM: nu tja sikali tua qipu, ljekacauan a sauzayan," ayain a kaka tjavulung.
S.PHON: nu ʦa sikaɣi tua qipu, ʎəkaʦauan a sauzajan," ajain a kaka ʦavuɣuŋ.
S.TRANSL: If we dig the soil with it, treasure appears,” he said to his older brother.

S.FORM: kiɫavaran a kaka a tjavulung: "nu maitazua pasedjami aken tua nisun a titaw," aya a kaka a tjavulung.
S.PHON: kiʎavaran a kaka a cavuɭuŋ: "nu maitazua pasəɉami akən tua nisun a titaw," aja a kaka a cavuɭuŋ.
S.FORM: kiljavaran a kaka a tjavulung: "nu maitazua pasedjami aken tua nisun a titaw," aya a kaka a tjavulung.
S.PHON: kiʎavaRan a kaka a ʦavuɣuŋ: "nu maitazua pasəɉami akən tua nisun a titaw," aja a kaka a ʦavuɣuŋ.
S.TRANSL: The older brother said: “In that case lend me your hoe,” said the older brother.

S.FORM: qau pasedjaman, sa titavan nua kaka a tjavulung tua qipu.
S.PHON: qau pasəɉaman, sa titavan nua kaka a cavuɭuŋ tua qipu.
S.FORM: qau pasedjaman, sa titavan nua kaka a tjavulung tua qipu.
S.PHON: qau pasəɉaman, sa titavan nua kaka a ʦavuɣuŋ tua qipu.
S.TRANSL: So he lent it and the older one hoed the soil with it.

S.FORM: ɫakua nu temitaw, qatsiɫai katua kasiw sakamaya.
S.PHON: ʎakua nu təmitaw, qaʦiʎai katua kasiw sakamaja.
S.FORM: ljakua nu temitaw, qaciljai katua kasiw sakamaya.
S.PHON: ʎakua nu təmitaw, qaʦiʎai katua kasiw sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: But when he hoed there were only stones and wood.

S.FORM: qau limutseng azua kaka; siverits azua titaw.
S.PHON: qau ɭimuʦəŋ azua kaka; sivəriʦ azua titaw.
S.FORM: qau limuceng azua kaka; siveric azua titaw.
S.PHON: qau ɣimuʦəŋ azua kaka; sivəRiʦ azua titaw.
S.TRANSL: So that brother was angry and threw away the hoe.

S.FORM: qau limutseng azua kaka a tjaɫaɫak uta.
S.PHON: qau ɭimuʦəŋ azua kaka a caʎaʎak uta.
S.FORM: qau limuceng azua kaka a tjaljaljak uta.
S.PHON: qau ɣimuʦəŋ azua kaka a ʦaʎaʎak uta.
S.TRANSL: So the younger brother was angry too.

S.FORM: ini anga pare qaqivuivu tiamadju.
S.PHON: ini aŋa parə qaqivuivu tiamaɉu.
S.FORM: ini anga pare qaqivuivu tiamadju.
S.PHON: ini aŋa paRə qaqivuivu tiamaɉu.
S.TRANSL: They wouldn’t speak to one another.

S.FORM: uzai a qadaw malap azua kaka a tjaɫaɫak tua ɫaugiu, sa kani.
S.PHON: uzai a qadaw maɭap azua kaka a caʎaʎak tua ʎaugiu, sa kani.
S.FORM: uzai a qadaw malap azua kaka a tjaljaljak tua ljaugiu, sa kani.
S.PHON: uzai a qadaw maɣap azua kaka a ʦaʎaʎak tua ʎaugiu, sa kani.
S.TRANSL: One day the younger brother took some shallots and ate them,

S.FORM: sa vaik a sema tjua mamazangiɫan, sa qetjutj.
S.PHON: sa vaik a səma cua mamazaŋiʎan, sa qəcuc.
S.FORM: sa vaik a sema tjua mamazangiljan, sa qetjutj.
S.PHON: sa vaik a səma ʦua mamazaŋiʎan, sa qəʦuʦ.
S.TRANSL: and went to the chief’s place, and broke wind.

S.FORM: manu semqu azua mamazangiɫan; manu paka nguɫinguɫ aravats a mamazangiɫan.
S.PHON: manu səmqu azua mamazaŋiʎan; manu paka ŋuʎiŋuʎ aravaʦ a mamazaŋiʎan.
S.FORM: manu semqu azua mamazangiljan; manu paka nguljingulj aravac a mamazangiljan.
S.PHON: manu səmqu azua mamazaŋiʎan; manu paka ŋuʎiŋuʎ aRavaʦ a mamazaŋiʎan.
S.TRANSL: The chief smelled it and thought it very fragrant.

S.FORM: qau pavayan tua vaɫitjuq marka lami.
S.PHON: qau pavajan tua vaʎicuq marka ɭami.
S.FORM: qau pavayan tua valjitjuq marka lami.
S.PHON: qau pavajan tua vaʎiʦuq maRka ɣami.
S.TRANSL: And he gave him money and staple foods.

S.FORM: manu lemangda a kaka a tjavulung tu nakeman tua ɫaugiu sa qetjutj; qau kipavayan anga timadju tua vaɫitjuq, aya linangdan.
S.PHON: manu ɭəmaŋda a kaka a cavuɭuŋ tu nakəman tua ʎaugiu sa qəcuc; qau kipavajan aŋa timaɉu tua vaʎicuq, aja ɭinaŋdan.
S.FORM: manu lemangda a kaka a tjavulung tu nakeman tua ljaugiu sa qetjutj; qau kipavayan anga timadju tua valjitjuq, aya linangdan.
S.PHON: manu ɣəmaŋda a kaka a ʦavuɣuŋ tu nakəman tua ʎaugiu sa qəʦuʦ; qau kipavajan aŋa timaɉu tua vaʎiʦuq, aja ɣinaŋdan.
S.TRANSL: The older brother heard that he had eaten shallots and broken wind, and had been given money, according to what he heard.

S.FORM: "nangaq a vaik aken a tsemakaw tua ɫaugiu, sa ku kani; sa ku vaik a qemtjutj tua mamazangiɫan.
S.PHON: "naŋaq a vaik akən a ʦəmakaw tua ʎaugiu, sa ku kani; sa ku vaik a qəmcuc tua mamazaŋiʎan.
S.FORM: "nangaq a vaik aken a cemakaw tua ljaugiu, sa ku kani; sa ku vaik a qemtjutj tua mamazangiljan.
S.PHON: "naŋaq a vaik akən a ʦəmakaw tua ʎaugiu, sa ku kani; sa ku vaik a qəmʦuʦ tua mamazaŋiʎan.
S.TRANSL: “I must go and steal some shallots and eat them and go and break wind to the chief,

S.FORM: ki ken a pavayi anga tua vaɫitjuq nua mamazangiɫan," aya timadju.
S.PHON: ki kən a pavaji aŋa tua vaʎicuq nua mamazaŋiʎan," aja timaɉu.
S.FORM: ki ken a pavayi anga tua valjitjuq nua mamazangiljan," aya timadju.
S.PHON: ki kən a pavaji aŋa tua vaʎiʦuq nua mamazaŋiʎan," aja timaɉu.
S.TRANSL: and the chief will give me some money,” he said.

S.FORM: qau vaik a tsemakaw tua ɫaugiu sa kani, sa vaik a qemtjutj tua mamazangiɫan.
S.PHON: qau vaik a ʦəmakaw tua ʎaugiu sa kani, sa vaik a qəmcuc tua mamazaŋiʎan.
S.FORM: qau vaik a cemakaw tua ljaugiu sa kani, sa vaik a qemtjutj tua mamazangiljan.
S.PHON: qau vaik a ʦəmakaw tua ʎaugiu sa kani, sa vaik a qəmʦuʦ tua mamazaŋiʎan.
S.TRANSL: So he went and stole some shallots and ate them, and went and broke wind to the chief.

S.FORM: manu qangsel aravats.
S.PHON: manu qaŋsəɭ aravaʦ.
S.FORM: manu qangsel aravac.
S.PHON: manu qaŋsəɣ aRavaʦ.
S.TRANSL: It made a dreadful stink.

S.FORM: qau limutseng a mamazangiɫan.
S.PHON: qau ɭimuʦəŋ a mamazaŋiʎan.
S.FORM: qau limuceng a mamazangiljan.
S.PHON: qau ɣimuʦəŋ a mamazaŋiʎan.
S.TRANSL: The chief was angry,

S.FORM: seqasen anga azua kaka a tjavulung.
S.PHON: səqasən aŋa azua kaka a cavuɭuŋ.
S.FORM: seqasen anga azua kaka a tjavulung.
S.PHON: səqasən aŋa azua kaka a ʦavuɣuŋ.
S.TRANSL: and the older brother was cut down (and killed).
